pets.name: Buddy
pets.description: Buddy is an extremely friendly and energetic golden boy. He loves playing fetch, is great with children, and knows basic commands like sit and stay.

pets.name: Milo
pets.description: Milo is a calm and quiet Persian cat who loves lounging near windows. He is very clean, litter-trained, and enjoys soft head scratches.

pets.name: Luna
pets.description: Luna is a beautiful, blue-eyed Husky pup. She is incredibly playful, talkative, and requires an active family who can take her on long runs.

pets.name: Bella
pets.description: Bella is a sweet little Cockatiel who can whistle beautiful melodies. She is hand-tamed and loves sitting on shoulders while you work.

pets.name: Snowball
pets.description: Snowball is a fluffy cloud of joy! She loves eating fresh carrots and running around in safe open spaces. Very gentle natured.
